name: FiBuKI Tax Studio
description: Access European bank transactions via PSD2 Open Banking. Browse accounts, search payments, auto-match receipts to transactions, categorize expenses, and manage partners. 25 tools for full bookkeeping control.

channel.blurb: Access European bank payments via PSD2 Open Banking — search transactions, match receipts, categorize expenses

apiKey.description: Your FiBuKI API key. Generate at fibuki.com > Settings > Integrations > AI Agents, or run: npx @fibukiapp/cli auth
